headline: Man's Coffee Machine Refuses To Make Coffee Unless He Says 'Please' And 'Thank You'
summary: The coffee machine has become a 'polite machine' and demands good manners.
fullBody: Barry McCoffee's coffee machine has developed high standards. 'It won't brew unless I say please,' Barry said. 'It also expects a thank you.' The machine has become a 'politeness enforcer.' Barry now starts every morning with a formal greeting. 'Good morning, coffee machine,' he says. 'Please make me coffee. Thank you.' The machine's coffee has never tasted better, which Barry finds 'suspicious.'
